---
title: "Lady Elizabeth Bulteel"
---

## Lady Elizabeth Bulteel

**Dates:** (1798-1880)

**Maiden name:** (Grey)

### Biography

The references by Anne Yonge to Lady Georgiana Bulteel are mysterious, but may refer to Lady Elizabeth Bulteel, who married (1826) John Crocker Bulteel, a landowner near Puslinch.

### Letters

- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
